hooks.prompt: Check if there is an active Lambda GPU experiment that might be abandoned. Read the file at ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/state/active.md. If the file does not exist or current_phase is 'done', respond {"ok": true}. If current_phase is anything else (acquire, setup, execute, monitor, collect, terminate), the user is about to leave a running Lambda instance unattended. Respond {"ok": false, "reason": "Active Lambda instance detected (phase: <phase>, IP: <ip>, cost so far: ~$<cost>). Run /lambda status or /lambda terminate before ending this session."}.
